title: The Proposed EU-India FTA: Implications for Textiles, Wearing Apparel and Leather Products

summary.about: How an EU–India free-trade agreement could affect India’s textile, apparel and leather sectors.
summary.audience: EU and Indian trade officials, textile exporters and industry groups.
summary.method: Uses GTAP 7 to compare full bilateral tariff elimination with a sector-focused liberalization scenario.
summary.insights: India gains in both scenarios, but benefits concentrate in selected products and do little to improve the existing specialization pattern.
